name: generic-extractor
description: Turns arbitrary bytes into safe, ready-to-use HTML for files outside every other extractor's coverage: plain text/source code (monospaced, indent-preserving wrap) or a hex + Latin-1 dump for anything else. Exactly two <pre> elements ever, regardless of file size. Optional Find/Find-Next/Find-Prev and hex<->text cross-highlighting via a small embedded script that only ever touches bytes already sitting in the DOM as inert text. Zero runtime dependencies.
